Acute Care Wards.triggerThreshold: 2 or more epidemiologically linked cases of respiratory illness within a 72-hour window.
Acute Care Wards.isolationProtocol: Strict droplet & contact precautions. Patients isolated in single-occupancy rooms; staff cohorting initiated.
Acute Care Wards.antiviralPolicy: Proactive antiviral prophylaxis (Oseltamivir/Tamiflu) offered to all eligible ward contacts within 24 hours of confirmation.

Continuing Care Homes.triggerThreshold: 2 or more residents on a unit exhibiting new clinical symptoms, or 1 lab-confirmed viral pathogen + 1 symptomatic resident.
Continuing Care Homes.isolationProtocol: Immediate cell/room confinement of affected residents. All communal dining and group activities suspended on the unit.
Continuing Care Homes.antiviralPolicy: Mandated prophylaxis for all asymptomatic residents on affected units immediately upon Medical Officer of Health (MOH) order.

Supportive Living / Shelter.triggerThreshold: 3 or more linked cases within 48 hours, or a rapid surge in typical respiratory or enteric symptoms.
Supportive Living / Shelter.isolationProtocol: Designation of isolated cohort dormitories. Masks distributed to all residents and visitors in public areas.
Supportive Living / Shelter.antiviralPolicy: Triage assessment for high-risk elderly or immunocompromised residents; direct referral to secondary urgent care.

RESPIRATORY_VIRUS_SURVEILLANCE.verification: Seasonal metrics curated from AHS RVD; auto RVD summary arrays refresh separately under RVD_RESPIRATORY_CASE_COUNTS.

WASTEWATER_SIGNALS.source: PHAC Health Infobase wastewater API + Alberta RVD

CHILDHOOD_IMMUNIZATION_COVERAGE.source: Alberta childhood immunization coverage by zone
